summary.text: A tech explorer with 8+ months of professional experience and a competitive programmer with 6+ years of experience in problem solving and algorithmic challenges, including 150+ online/offline programming contest participations. Interested in contributing to innovative projects in software development through the latest technologies.

items.title: Junior Software Engineer (Full Stack)
items.description: Working on NTouch PMS, a multi-tenant SaaS Hotel Management System built with ABP Framework using DDD and Clean Architecture. Designed and developed backend modules with ASP.NET Core and Entity Framework Core, implementing multi-tenancy, role-based authorization, and localization. Built responsive, modular frontend components using Angular and TypeScript. Applied OOP and DDD principles in an agile team using Jira and Azure DevOps.

items.title: ASP.NET Developer
items.description: Led development of VexaCare, a client-based healthcare solution architected with Clean Architecture and Repository Pattern. Implemented core features including payment gateway integration, AI-powered modules, and generic service layers using C#, ASP.NET Core, and Entity Framework. Managed team tasks, conducted code reviews, and ensured adherence to project specifications and deadlines.

items.title: Intern - ASP.NET Developer
items.description: Gained hands-on experience with ASP.NET Core, C#, MVC architecture, and SQL Server. Contributed to backend development applying Clean Architecture principles to build scalable, maintainable solutions. Worked in a team environment following OOP principles and the Repository Pattern.

items.institution: Dhaka University of Engineering & Technology, Gazipur

items.title: TECHFEST IIT Bombay 2024
items.result: 2nd Runners-Up (Bangladesh Zonal) and Finalist at IIT Bombay

items.title: National Programming Contests
items.result: Participated at ICPC (2022, 2023, 2024), NCPC-2024, DUET IUPC-2025, SEC IUPC-2022 and IDPC (2022, 2023, 2024)

items.title: Director of Finance
items.description: Managed budgeting, funding, and strategic financial planning for society initiatives. Organized DUET IUPC-2025 as volunteer in Finance and Sponsor Management.

items.title: Additional Network and Communication Secretary
items.description: Played an important role in organizing IDPC-2024.

items.title: Additional Programming and Algorithms Secretary
items.description: Conducted programming training sessions and organized programming contests.

items.title: NTouch PMS - AI-Powered Hospitality Property Management System
items.description: Multi-tenant SaaS PMS covering reservations, accounting, housekeeping, and government integrations. Built booking engine features (group reservation validation, room-change service continuity, default time settings), accounting workflows (balance sheet, chart of accounts, journal entry, accrued revenue, bank transactions, paginated ledger, voucher sequencing), guest management (10M+ records, multi-field search, expiry validation), contract and invoicing flows (PDF, partial invoicing, reactive pricing), and integration tests for booking rules and validation edge cases.

items.title: VexaCare - AI-Powered Healthcare Platform
items.description: Full-stack healthcare platform with patient management, doctor consultations, AI health analysis, and e-commerce. Architected using Clean Architecture and Repository Pattern with multi-role workflows, booking/scheduling, ratings, payouts, admin CMS, PayPal and Stripe integration, Google OAuth, and ASP.NET Core Identity. Implemented AI modules (VexaEpi, VexaGene, Microbiota) via OpenAI API with PDF report generation.

items.title: Acme BookStore CRUD Application
items.description: Full-stack book management system built with ABP Framework using DDD and layered architecture. ASP.NET Core Web API backend with Angular frontend. Utilized Entity Framework Core, Docker for containerization, and Grafana for monitoring.

items.title: Banking System Console Application
items.description: C# console-based banking system using OOP principles. Implements account creation, transactions, and interest application with error handling and modular design.

items: 4th place — BBPIPC (Brahmanbaria Polytechnic Institute Programming Contest)
Best Student of the Year — BBPI (GPA 4.00/4.00, 3rd Semester Academic Result)
